Audio Blocks.info: Inspired by MAX Msp and Built in React, AudioBlocks lets you create, connect and automate all sorts of audio nodes inside a ReactFlow Graph.
Audio Blocks.language: React Typescript JS CSS Html Tone.js

web-daw.info: A Web DAW (Digital Audio Workstation) made in React, it uses Tone.js for processing audio and features recording, effects, routing, automations, editting, instruments and way too many components.
web-daw.language: React Typescript JS CSS Html Tone.js
